title: gossypium arboreum var. neglectum
intro: Gossypium arboreum var. neglectum, also known as the cotton tree or Indian cotton, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has various health benefits, such as treating skin conditions, wounds, and digestive issues, due to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Herbal preparations of Gossypium arboreum var. neglectum include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and soothe skin irritations.
